---
title: "Deleting A Document"
---

---
title: "Deleting a Document"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Capture/mfv1646248502439"
section: "Hyland Capture"
---

You can delete a document from a batch if that document is erroneously added to the batch.

Note:
If you delete all documents in the batch, the batch is deleted automatically.

To delete a document:

1.  Click anywhere in the document area of the relevant document that you want to delete. The document is highlighted.
2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Delete document or press Alt + Delete. The document is deleted from the batch.
